Activities

SunPower Corporation, a NASDAQ-listed company, is a leading provider of high-efficiency solar technology and solutions, specializing in the design, manufacturing, and installation of photovoltaic systems for residential, commercial, and utility-scale applications. The company's core activities encompass the development of advanced solar panels, energy storage systems, and integrated software for monitoring and optimizing renewable energy use, supporting the global transition to sustainable power sources. Among its fastest-growing segments are residential solar installations, fueled by rising consumer demand for clean energy and supportive government incentives, as well as commercial energy storage solutions that enhance grid reliability and cost savings. SunPower's innovative focus on high-performance products and digital platforms positions it to capitalize on the expanding solar market, driving efficiency and reducing carbon footprints for its customers. It is the NASDAQ's 24th largest Utility company by market capitalisation.

Tilray Brands Inc., NASDAQ:TLRY, offers a comprehensive range of products in the cannabis industry with a focus on providing high-quality experiences. Their product line includes Tilray CBD oil and Tilray THC vape cartridges, catering to diverse needs. The Tilray cannabis gummies and Tilray cannabis tinctures provide edibles for those exploring new consumption formats. For those preferring traditional options, Tilray pre-rolls and Tilray dried cannabis flower are available, along with Tilray THC edibles tailored for various preferences. Their extensive portfolio covers everything from Tilray medical cannabis products to Tilray adult-use cannabis products, enhancing accessibility for different user groups.

Incorporating wellness solutions, Tilray offers Tilray CBD topicals, Tilray CBD softgels, and even Tilray CBD pet products, extending their reach into pet care. Their collaboration with Manitoba Harvest brings Manitoba Harvest hemp foods including Manitoba Harvest hemp protein, to health-conscious consumers. They further expand into beverages with Tilray infused beverages and Tilray cannabis beverages, complemented by SweetWater craft beer (Tilray).

Their innovation in devices and concentrates is evident with Tilray vape pens & cartridges, Tilray cannabis concentrates, Tilray live resin, Tilray hash rosin, and an array of Tilray extraction products. Tilray cultivation genetics & strains underline their commitment to quality, while Tilray branded pre-roll packs and Tilray bulk THC cartridges cater to consumer needs. Additionally, Tilray CBD isolate powder and Tilray full-spectrum CBD oil showcase their expertise in product development.

With a robust presence in the Tilray U.S. cannabis distribution network, Tilray product availability U.S. ensures broad access across the region. Tilray cannabis retail brands provide a comprehensive marketplace for consumers to explore. Tilray continues to be a frontrunner in innovation and customer satisfaction in the cannabis sector.

SECTION 2 CORPORATE PROFILE

2.1 Activities

Sempra, a leading energy infrastructure company listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SRE), is a Fortune 500 holding entity headquartered in San Diego, California. The company's core business revolves around the development, operation, and investment in energy infrastructure, including natural gas utilities, pipelines, storage facilities, and electric services across North America. Through subsidiaries like San Diego Gas & Electric and Southern California Gas Company, Sempra delivers reliable energy to millions of customers, emphasizing safety, sustainability, and operational efficiency. Among its fastest-growing segments are renewable energy projects and liquefied natural gas (LNG) exports, driven by increasing demand for clean energy solutions and global market expansion. For instance, Sempra's investments in wind, solar, and battery storage, as well as its LNG facilities in Mexico and the U.S., have fueled significant growth, positioning the company as a key player in the energy transition. With a strong focus on innovation and strategic partnerships, Sempra continues to enhance its It is the NYSE's 4th largest Utility company by market capitalisation.

Sempra (NYSE:SRE) is strategically positioned as a powerhouse in the energy sector, leveraging a diversified business model focused on regulated utility rate increase dynamics and robust investments in energy infrastructure. As a key player, Sempra's comprehensive base rate approval, specifically the Oncor base rate review approval, strengthens its influence in the Texas electric utility base rate landscape. The company's operations, encompassing electric transmission and distribution services and natural gas pipelines and storage, showcase its commitment to energy infrastructure growth. Significant grid modernization at Oncor, paired with reliable utility capital expenditures (capex), underscores Sempra's proactive approach in enhancing transmission and distribution investment. Additionally, renewable energy projects Sempra, along with battery storage projects Sempra, highlight its dedication to sustainable energy solutions. With competitive strengths in Sempra regulated utilities (SoCalGas SDG&E Oncor) and a focus on regulated rate base expansion, Sempra offers promising avenues for Sempra investor earnings growth amid regulatory approvals and utility revenue requirement approval.

SECTION 3 RECENT NEWS & PAST YEAR TOP 10 STORIES

3.1 RECENT NEWS

Recent News 1 of 1, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 346 words

Sat Apr 18, 2026: Sempra Secures Regulatory Approval for Oncor's Rate Review

Sempra has announced a significant regulatory milestone as the Public Utility Commission of Texas (PUCT) approved a final order in Oncor Electric Delivery Company LLC's comprehensive base rate review proceeding. This approval, dated 20th April 2026, secures an annual revenue requirement of approximately $6.97 billion for Oncor, in which Sempra holds an 80.25% interest, marking an increase of about $560 million, or 8.7%, over Oncor's adjusted annualized revenues as outlined in the rate application.

The approved order includes a revised regulatory capital structure ratio of 56.5% debt to 43.5% equity, an authorized return on equity of 9.75%, and an authorized cost of debt of 4.94%. These figures indicate a positive shift from Oncor's previous authorized capital structure, which was 57.5% debt to 42.5% equity, along with a return on equity of 9.70% and a cost of debt of 4.39%. This change is expected to bolster Oncor's financial health, benefiting both Sempra and its investors.

Additionally, the order establishes a self-insurance reserve with an annual accrual amount in rates of $200 million for storm costs and other self-insured losses, a notable increase from the previous $122 million. A five-year amortization period for applicable regulatory assets and liabilities has also been set, excluding rate case expenses and year-end 2024 deferred system resiliency plan costs.

Oncor anticipates that this regulatory approval will have a positive impact on its future earnings, cash flow, and credit metrics. The company is permitted to surcharge the difference between the new billing rates and its current rates for the period from January 1, 2026, until the new rates take effect, which will be 45 days from the date of the final order. Oncor plans to file for this surcharge shortly after the new billing rates become effective, with recovery expected throughout 2026.

This development is a significant step forward for Sempra and Oncor, enhancing their financial stability and positioning them for future growth in the energy sector. Investors may want to evaluate the implications of this approval on Sempra's profitability and stock valuations, as understanding the business dynamics is crucial before making investment decisions.

3.2 PAST YEAR TOP 10 STORIES

Story 1 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 71 words

Strategic Infrastructure Asset Monetization - $10 Billion KKR/CPP Investments Transaction

Sempra has agreed to sell a 45% non-controlling interest in Sempra Infrastructure Partners to a KKR-led consortium for $10 billion, valuing the subsidiary at approximately $31.7 billion. The deal, expected to close in mid-2026, allows Sempra to retain a 25% stake while deconsolidating the unit to improve its corporate credit profile. Proceeds will be received in stages through approximately 2033, eliminating planned equity issuances for 2025-2029 and funding U.S. utility investments.

Story 2 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 64 words

Port Arthur LNG Phase 2 Final Investment Decision - $14 Billion Expansion with Full Equity Financing

Sempra Infrastructure approved the $14 billion Port Arthur LNG Phase 2 expansion, adding two liquefaction trains and approximately 13 million tonnes per annum (MTPA) of capacity. A consortium led by Blackstone Credit & Insurance is providing $7 billion for a 49.9% minority equity stake, fully funding the equity requirement. Commercial operations are targeted for 2030-2031, with long-term offtake agreements already securing over 7.5 MTPA.

Story 3 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 67 words

Port Arthur LNG Phase 2 Regulatory Authorization - Non-FTA Export Permit Approval

The U.S. Department of Energy granted Port Arthur LNG Phase 2 a permit to export 13.5 MTPA to non-free trade agreement countries, a critical regulatory step for broadening the project's global market reach. This authorization, along with prior FERC approval, supports the project's commercial viability and aligns with U.S. energy security goals. The permit was the first non-FTA authorization issued following the DOE's recent public interest study.

Story 4 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 57 words

Multi-Party LNG Offtake Agreements Portfolio - JERA, ConocoPhillips, and EQT Anchor Subscriptions

Sempra Infrastructure signed 20-year sales and purchase agreements with JERA (1.5 MTPA), ConocoPhillips (4 MTPA), and EQT Corporation (2 MTPA) for Port Arthur LNG Phase 2. These agreements commit 7.5 MTPA of the project's capacity, validating global demand and strengthening strategic partnerships. The deals were contingent on the final investment decision, which was successfully achieved in September.

Story 5 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 60 words

Q3 2025 Financial Results - Strong Earnings Beat and Guidance Reaffirmation

Sempra reported strong Q3 2025 adjusted earnings of $1.11 per share, beating analyst estimates, and reaffirmed its full-year EPS guidance for 2025 and 2026. The company highlighted successful execution of value creation initiatives, including the Port Arthur Phase 2 FID and asset sales. Capital deployment remains robust, particularly at Oncor, which is seeing significant growth driven by data center interconnections.

Story 6 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 63 words

Oncor Base Rate Case and Texas Regulatory Progress - $834 Million Rate Increase Request

Oncor filed a base rate case requesting an $834 million increase to cover storm recovery costs, inflation, and higher interest rates. The request aims to align rates with economic realities and support a massive capital investment plan for grid reliability in growing Texas markets. A settlement agreement has been approved regarding surcharges if proceedings extend past January 2026, with hearings scheduled for November.

Story 7 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 62 words

Energia Costa Azul LNG Phase 1 - Advanced Construction Progress Targeting Spring 2026 Commercial Operations

Construction on the Energia Costa Azul LNG Phase 1 terminal is over 90% complete, with commercial operations targeted for spring 2026. Despite earlier delays and cost pressures, the project is advancing toward its DOE export deadline, supported by a $1.58 billion debt financing package. The facility will produce approximately 3 MTPA, serving Pacific Basin markets through long-term agreements with Mitsui and TotalEnergies.

Story 8 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 59 words

Sempra Sustainability Recognition - 14th Consecutive Dow Jones Sustainability Index Inclusion

Sempra was named to the Dow Jones Sustainability Index North America for the 14th consecutive year, recognizing its leadership in ESG performance, risk management, and community relations. The distinction places Sempra among the top 20% of large North American companies for sustainability practices. This recognition complements other accolades, highlighting the company's focus on responsible business practices and shareholder value.

Story 9 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 54 words

Cameron LNG FERC Approval - Five-Year Extension for Expansion Construction Timeline

FERC granted Sempra a five-year extension, until March 2033, to complete the Cameron LNG expansion project in Louisiana. The request followed changes in federal LNG export policy and provides necessary flexibility for project planning and financing. The extension supports continued development of the facility, which remains a key component of U.S. LNG export capacity.

Story 10 of 10, Source: HourlyBusinessNews, 62 words

SDG&E Golden Pacific Powerlink Transmission Project - Critical 500-kV Grid Reinforcement Initiative

SDG&E announced plans to build the Golden Pacific Powerlink, a 500-kV transmission line identified by CAISO as essential for California's grid reliability and carbon goals. The project will connect Imperial Valley to San Diego/Orange Counties, with construction slated to begin in 2029 for a 2032 in-service date. Costs will be shared statewide, limiting the impact on local SDG&E customers to approximately 9%.

urn:contentItem:6JH6-9SW3-SH32-B42X-00000-00Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) Sets Out Terafab Plan With Intel to Build Two Chip Factories in Austin2026-05-05T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:42:21ZLexisNexisTesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) Sets Out Terafab Plan With Intel to Build Two Chip Factories in Austin

AMERICAN DAILY STOCK REPORT

UNITED STATES EDITION

04 May 2026 11:46 EDT

Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) has outlined the Terafab project, a plan to build its own semiconductor foundry to support internal chip needs for its robots, electric vehicles and SpaceX AI data centers. On 4th May 2026, the company said Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC) will assist with a capital investment exceeding $25 billion to construct two advanced chip factories in Austin, Texas. The Terafab initiative aims to reduce dependence on external suppliers such as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (NYSE: TSM) and strengthen vertical integration for Tesla and SpaceX operations. Analysts note the project carries considerable risk given rapid advances in semiconductor technology and the scale of the investment, but potential rewards could come from improved efficiency and more predictable supply chains if timelines are met

IN TODAY'S REPORT:

SECTION 1 TESLA ACTIVITIES

SECTION 1 Tesla Activities

Activities

Tesla, Inc., a leading American electric vehicle and clean energy company headquartered in Austin, Texas, and listed on the Nasdaq, focuses on designing, manufacturing, and selling innovative electric cars, energy storage systems, and solar products. Its core business revolves around accelerating the global transition to sustainable energy, with flagship electric vehicles like the Model 3 and Model Y dominating the market through advanced battery technology and performance features. The fastest-growing segments include energy storage solutions, such as the Powerwall and Megapack, which are increasingly adopted for residential, commercial, and utility-scale applications to support renewable energy integration and grid stability. Additionally, Tesla's autonomous driving technology and artificial intelligence capabilities, embedded in vehicles and expanded through its Full Self-Driving software, are experiencing rapid expansion, driven by rising demand for smart mobility solutions. This diversification, coupled with global manufacturing expansions in China and Germany, positions Tesla as a key player in the evolving sustainable technology landscape. It is the NASDAQ's largest Auto company by market capitalisation.

urn:contentItem:6JK4-0TW3-S3VK-N3D3-00000-00Analyzing Uni-Pixel OTCMKTS:UNXLQ & American Superconductor NASDAQ:AMSC2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:42:21ZLexisNexisAnalyzing Uni-Pixel OTCMKTS:UNXLQ & American Superconductor NASDAQ:AMSC

Uni-Pixel OTCMKTS:UNXLQ - Get Free Report and American Superconductor NASDAQ:AMSC - Get Free Report are both computer and technology companies, but which is the better stock? We will contrast the two businesses based on the strength of their risk, dividends, earnings, profitability, analyst recommendations, institutional ownership and valuation.

Insider and Institutional Ownership

52.3% of American Superconductor shares are held by institutional investors. 1.5% of Uni-Pixel shares are held by insiders. Comparatively, 4.8% of American Superconductor shares are held by insiders. Strong institutional ownership is an indication that hedge funds, large money managers and endowments believe a stock is poised for long-term growth.

Analyst Recommendations

This is a breakdown of current ratings and recommmendations for Uni-Pixel and American Superconductor, as provided by MarketBeat.com.

Sell RatingsHold RatingsBuy RatingsStrong Buy RatingsRating ScoreUni-Pixel00000.00American Superconductor02102.33

Given Uni-Pixel's higher probable upside, equities research analysts plainly believe Uni-Pixel is more favorable than American Superconductor.

Valuation & Earnings

This table compares Uni-Pixel and American Superconductor"s gross revenue, earnings per share EPS and valuation.

Profitability

Summary

American Superconductor beats Uni-Pixel on 8 of the 9 factors compared between the two stocks.

About Uni-Pixel Get Free Report

Uni-Pixel, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and markets micro-structured polymer film materials and related technologies for the display, flexible electronics, and automotive industries in the United States. The company markets its touch screen films as sub-components of a touch sensor module under the XTouch brand; and hard coat resin and optical films under the Diamond Guard brand. Uni-Pixel, Inc. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Santa Clara, California. On February 21, 2018, the voluntary petition of Uni-Pixel, Inc. for reorganization under Chapter 11 was converted to Chapter 7. It had filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on August 30, 2017.

About American Superconductor Get Free Report

American Superconductor Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, provides megawatt-scale power resiliency solutions worldwide. The company operates through Grid and Wind segments. The Grid segment offers products and services that enable electric utilities, industrial facilities, and renewable energy project developers to connect, transmit, and distribute power under the Gridtec Solutions brand. It provides transmission planning services, which identify power grid congestion, poor power quality, and other risks; grid interconnection solutions for wind farms and solar power plants, power quality systems, and transmission and distribution cable systems; D-VAR systems used for controlling power flow and voltage in the AC transmission system; actiVAR system, a fast-switching medium-voltage reactive compensation solution; armorVAR system installed for reactive compensation, power factor correction, loss reduction, utility bill savings, and mitigation of common power quality concerns related to power converter-based generation and load devices; and D-VAR volt var optimization VVO that serves the distribution power grid market. This segment also offers ship protection systems, which reduce a naval ship's magnetic signature; and ON board power delivery systems, power generation systems, and propulsion systems; and transformers and rectifiers systems. The Wind segment designs wind turbine systems and licenses these designs to third parties under the Windtec Solutions brand. It also supplies power electronics and software-based control systems, engineered designs, and support services; and provides customer support services to wind turbine manufacturers. This segment's design portfolio comprises a range of drivetrains and power ratings of 2 megawatts and higher. American Superconductor Corporation was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Ayer, Massachusetts.

May 12, 2026 - Press release 1 of 4:

ASIA - PACIFIC INVESTMENT AGORA, INC. TO REPORT FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS ON MAY 26, 2026

SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 12, 2026 -- Agora, Inc. (NASDAQ: API), a pioneer and leader in conversational AI and real-time engagement technology, will release its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026 after the close of U.S. markets on May 26, 2026. Agora, Inc. will host a conference call to discuss the financial results at 6 p.m. Pacific Time / 9 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Details for the conference call are as follows:

Event title: Agora, Inc. 1Q 2026 Financial Results

The call will be available at https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/vbsrxuhv

Investors who want to hear the call should log on at least 15 minutes prior to the broadcast. Participants may register for the call with the link below.

https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BIdac26bffc0104a0da1dfcd94c16d1908

Please visit Agora, Inc.s investor relations website at https://investor.agora.io on May 26, 2026 to view the earnings release and accompanying slides prior to the conference call.

About Agora, Inc.

Agora, Inc. is the holding company of two independent divisions, under Agora brand and Shengwang brand.

Headquartered in Santa Clara, California, Agora is a pioneer and global leader in conversational AI and Real-Time Engagement Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS), providing developers with simple, flexible, and powerful application programming interfaces, or APIs, to embed real-time conversational AI, video, voice, chat and interactive streaming into their applications.

Headquartered in Shanghai, China, Shengwang is a pioneer and leading conversational AI and Real-Time Engagement PaaS provider in the China market.

For more information on Agora, please visit: www.agora.ioFor more information on Shengwang, please visit: www.shengwang.cn

Investor Contact: investor@agora.io Media Contact: press@agora.io

Source: West Corporation

ACTIVITIES:

Asia-Pacific Investment Joint Stock Company, a key player in Vietnam's financial sector, specializes in investment banking, asset management, and securities trading. The company focuses on facilitating capital raising for businesses and managing diversified portfolios for institutional and retail investors, with a strong emphasis on emerging markets in the Asia-Pacific region. Its core activities include equity investments, bond issuance, and advisory services, supporting economic development through strategic partnerships. Among its fastest-growing segments are technology and renewable energy investments, fueled by Vietnam's digital transformation and green initiatives, which have seen double-digit growth in recent years. This expansion has enhanced the company's revenue streams and market presence, positioning it as a reliable partner for sustainable financial solutions while maintaining robust risk management practices.

May 12, 2026 - Press release 2 of 4:

KINHBAC CITY DEVELOPMENT KBC GROUP: FIRST-QUARTER RESULT OF 557 MILLION EUROS

We recorded a net profit of 557 million euros in the first quarter of 2026. Compared to the previous quarter, our total income benefited from strong net interest income, higher insurance revenues, slightly higher net fee and commission income despite the geopolitical turmoil and increased net other income, while trading & fair value income and dividend income were down. Our loan portfolio continued to expand, growing organically by 2% quarter-on-quarter and by as much as 7% year-on-year. Customer deposits aEUR" excluding volatile, low-margin short-term deposits at KBC BankaEUR(TradeMark)s foreign branches aEUR" were stable quarter-on-quarter and up 3% year-on-year. As usual, the first quarter of the year included the bulk of the bank and insurance taxes for the entire year. Operating expenses excluding bank and insurance taxes were down slightly on the previous quarter, due in part to seasonal effects, while insurance service expenses after reinsurance were slightly up. Loan loss impairment charges for our lending book were slightly up on the level recorded in the previous quarter, and due to the geopolitical turmoil we increased the reserve (ECL and management overlay) for geopolitical and macroeconomic uncertainties by 75 million euros, resulting in a total reserve of 175 million euros

Source: West Corporation

Kinhbac City Development Holding Corporation, based in Vietnam, is a leading real estate and urban development firm specializing in the creation and management of industrial parks, residential communities, and infrastructure projects. Its core activities include land acquisition, construction, and investment in large-scale developments that drive economic growth and urbanization. The company's fastest-growing segments encompass industrial real estate, fueled by rising foreign direct investment in manufacturing hubs, and sustainable urban projects that address increasing demand for eco-friendly housing and commercial spaces. By leveraging strategic partnerships and innovative planning, Kinhbac continues to expand its portfolio, contributing to Vietnam's infrastructure advancements while maintaining high standards of operational efficiency and environmental responsibility.

urn:contentItem:6JHV-JGT3-S2F2-P3NJ-00000-00Sempra (NYSE:SRE) Appoints Jennifer M. Kirk to Board to Strengthen Governance2026-05-08T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:42:21ZLexisNexisSempra (NYSE:SRE) Appoints Jennifer M. Kirk to Board to Strengthen Governance

AMERICAN DAILY STOCK REPORT

UNITED STATES EDITION

07 May 2026 14:15 EDT

Sempra (NYSE:SRE) Appoints Jennifer M. Kirk to Its Board of Directors, Effective 20th June 2024, as part of a governance initiative focused on financial discipline and risk management. Kirk, who currently serves as the global controller and chief accounting officer at Medtronic plc, brings over two decades in the energy sector. She will join the audit committee and the safety, sustainability, and technology committee. The announcement was made on 6th May 2026 at 18:23:07.706818, and Sempra's board now comprises ten directors, three elected in the last five years.

SECTION 1 SEMPRA RECENT PRESS RELEASES

March 02: Sempra quarterly dividends up 1.9% sequentially from previous quarter

Sempra today announced a quarterly dividend of 65.75c per share for Q4/2025; up 1.9% sequentially from the previous quarter (Q3/2025) dividend of 64.50c. The ex-dividend date is Thursday, March 19, 2026 and the record date is Thursday, March 19, 2026 and it is payable on Wednesday, April 15.

March 02: Sempra quarterly dividends up 1.9% sequentially from previous quarter

Sempra today announced a quarterly dividend of 65.75c per share for Q4/2025; up 1.9% sequentially from the previous quarter (Q3/2025) dividend of 64.50c. The ex-dividend date is Thursday, March 19, 2026 and the record date is Thursday, March 19, 2026 and it is payable on Wednesday, April 15.

November 10, 2025: Sempra quarterly dividends steady

Sempra today announced a quarterly dividend of 64.50c per share for Q3/2025; unchanged from the previous quarter (Q3/2025) dividend of 64.50c. The ex-dividend date is Thursday, December 11 and the record date is Thursday, December 11, 2025 and it is payable on Thursday, January 15, 2026.

SECTION 2 SEMPRA ACTIVITIES

Activities

Sempra, a leading energy infrastructure company listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SRE), is a Fortune 500 holding entity headquartered in San Diego, California. The company's core business revolves around the development, operation, and investment in energy infrastructure, including natural gas utilities, pipelines, storage facilities, and electric services across North America. Through subsidiaries like San Diego Gas & Electric and Southern California Gas Company, Sempra delivers reliable energy to millions of customers, emphasizing safety, sustainability, and operational efficiency. Among its fastest-growing segments are renewable energy projects and liquefied natural gas (LNG) exports, driven by increasing demand for clean energy solutions and global market expansion. For instance, Sempra's investments in wind, solar, and battery storage, as well as its LNG facilities in Mexico and the U.S., have fueled significant growth, positioning the company as a key player in the energy transition. With a strong focus on innovation and strategic partnerships, Sempra continues to enhance its It is the NYSE's 4th largest Utility company by market capitalisation.

May 5th, 2026 ( Zolmax.com - Delivered by Newstex )

Horizon Investments LLC acquired a new stake in Tetra Tech, Inc. ( NASDAQ:TTEK - Free Report) during the fourth quarter, Holdings Channel.com reports. The firm acquired 55,691 shares of the industrial products company's stock, valued at approximately $1,868,000.

A number of other hedge funds and other institutional investors have also modified their holdings of TTEK. Brighton Jones LLC acquired a new stake in shares of Tetra Tech in the 4th quarter valued at $225,000. AQR Capital Management LLC grew its position in shares of Tetra Tech by 451.6% in the 1st quarter. AQR Capital Management LLC now owns 145,077 shares of the industrial products company's stock valued at $4,204,000 after buying an additional 118,774 shares during the last quarter. Goldman Sachs Group Inc. grew its position in shares of Tetra Tech by 136.5% in the 1st quarter. Goldman Sachs Group Inc. now owns 1,658,349 shares of the industrial products company's stock valued at $48,507,000 after buying an additional 957,050 shares during the last quarter. Geneos Wealth Management Inc. grew its position in shares of Tetra Tech by 136.1% in the 1st quarter. Geneos Wealth Management Inc. now owns 1,303 shares of the industrial products company's stock valued at $38,000 after buying an additional 751 shares during the last quarter. Finally, EverSource Wealth Advisors LLC grew its position in shares of Tetra Tech by 754.8% in the 2nd quarter. EverSource Wealth Advisors LLC now owns 1,855 shares of the industrial products company's stock valued at $67,000 after buying an additional 1,638 shares during the last quarter. 93.89% of the stock is currently owned by institutional investors and hedge funds.

Analysts Set New Price Targets

A number of research analysts recently commented on the stock. Weiss Ratings reaffirmed a "hold (c)" rating on shares of Tetra Tech in a research report on Monday, April 20th. Robert W. Baird set a $35.00 price target on shares of Tetra Tech in a research note on Thursday, April 30th. Four equities research analysts have rated the stock with a Buy rating and two have issued a Hold rating to the company's stock. Based on data from MarketBeat, the stock has a consensus rating of "Moderate Buy" and an average target price of $41.00.

Read Our Latest Stock Analysis on TTEK

Tetra Tech Stock Down 0.1%

TTEK stock opened at $31.65 on Wednesday. Tetra Tech, Inc. has a one year low of $29.57 and a one year high of $43.14. The stock has a market capitalization of $8.25 billion, a PE ratio of 18.95 and a beta of 1.00. The company has a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.47, a quick ratio of 1.31 and a current ratio of 1.25. The company has a fifty day moving average of $32.16 and a 200-day moving average of $34.12.

Tetra Tech ( NASDAQ:TTEK - Get Free Report) last released its earnings results on Wednesday, April 29th. The industrial products company reported $0.34 EPS for the quarter, topping the consensus estimate of $0.31 by $0.03. Tetra Tech had a net margin of 8.58% and a return on equity of 22.89%. The company had revenue of $1.22 billion during the quarter, compared to analysts' expectations of $1 billion. During the same quarter last year, the business earned $0.33 EPS. The business's revenue was down 7.7% on a year-over-year basis. Tetra Tech has set its FY 2026 guidance at 1.500-1.580 EPS and its Q3 2026 guidance at 0.38-0.41 EPS. As a group, analysts expect that Tetra Tech, Inc. will post 1.53 EPS for the current year.

Tetra Tech Increases Dividend

The company also recently announced a quarterly dividend, which will be paid on Tuesday, June 2nd. Stockholders of record on Thursday, May 14th will be paid a $0.072 dividend. This is a boost from Tetra Tech's previous quarterly dividend of $0.07. The ex-dividend date is Thursday, May 14th. This represents a $0.29 annualized dividend and a dividend yield of 0.9%. Tetra Tech's dividend payout ratio (DPR) is 15.57%.

About Tetra Tech

( Free Report)

Tetra Tech, Inc is a leading provider of consulting and engineering services with a focus on water, environment, infrastructure, resource management and energy sectors. Headquartered in Pasadena, California, the company delivers end-to-end solutions that encompass planning, design, engineering, program management and construction management. Tetra Tech's multidisciplinary teams integrate science, technology and advisory services to address complex challenges in areas such as water resources, environmental remediation, sustainable infrastructure and renewable energy.

The company's core offerings include environmental assessments and cleanup, water treatment and reuse, coastal and marine engineering, climate resilience planning, and engineering design for transportation and built environments.

May 2nd, 2026 ( Ticker Report - Delivered by Newstex )

CENTRAL TRUST Co lessened its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. ( NASDAQ:PEP - Free Report) by 2.7% in the 4th quarter, according to its most recent filing with the SEC. The fund owned 154,463 shares of the company's stock after selling 4,344 shares during the period. CENTRAL TRUST Co's holdings in PepsiCo were worth $22,169,000 at the end of the most recent quarter.

Several other institutional investors have also recently added to or reduced their stakes in the stock. Cairn Investment Group Inc. increased its holdings in PepsiCo by 1.3% in the 4th quarter. Cairn Investment Group Inc. now owns 35,930 shares of the company's stock valued at $5,157,000 after purchasing an additional 445 shares during the last quarter. Core Alternative Capital grew its stake in shares of PepsiCo by 47.8% during the fourth quarter. Core Alternative Capital now owns 4,550 shares of the company's stock worth $653,000 after purchasing an additional 1,472 shares in the last quarter. Oak Harbor Wealth Partners LLC grew its stake in shares of PepsiCo by 3.7% during the fourth quarter. Oak Harbor Wealth Partners LLC now owns 12,238 shares of the company's stock worth $1,756,000 after purchasing an additional 442 shares in the last quarter. PKO Investment Management Joint Stock Co grew its stake in shares of PepsiCo by 24.6% during the fourth quarter. PKO Investment Management Joint Stock Co now owns 57,314 shares of the company's stock worth $8,226,000 after purchasing an additional 11,314 shares in the last quarter. Finally, Souders Financial Advisors grew its stake in shares of PepsiCo by 8.4% during the fourth quarter. Souders Financial Advisors now owns 3,765 shares of the company's stock worth $540,000 after purchasing an additional 292 shares in the last quarter. Institutional investors and hedge funds own 73.07% of the company's stock.

More PepsiCo News

Here are the key news stories impacting PepsiCo this week:

Positive Sentiment: PepsiCo signed a 10?year virtual power purchase agreement with Statkraft to cut ~32,000 metric tons of CO2 annually across Europe supports sustainability targets and may lower long?term energy costs. PepsiCo inks 10-year renewable energy deal to cut emissions across Europe

Positive Sentiment: Zacks Research raised multiple near? and medium?term EPS estimates (including FY2027 and FY2028), signaling improved analyst expectations for profitability. PepsiCo (PEP) analyst note (MarketBeat summary)

Positive Sentiment: PepsiCo is expanding electrification of distribution with a 50 electric delivery truck rollout in Fresno incremental cost and emissions benefits and supports supply?chain decarbonization narrative. Fresno PepsiCo rolls out 50 electric delivery trucks, aims to reduce emissions

Positive Sentiment: Company announced a 2026 growth plan focused on cost cuts and product innovation potential margin improvement and revenue growth tailwinds if execution holds. PepsiCo sets 2026 growth plan with cost cuts, innovation push

Neutral Sentiment: Analyst and media pieces comparing Coca?Cola vs. PepsiCo provide context for relative valuation and may drive short?term trading but contain no new company?specific catalysts. Coca-Cola vs. PepsiCo: Which Stock Is the Better Buy?

Neutral Sentiment: PepsiCo plans to end its bottling/distribution partnership with Royal Unibrew in parts of Northern Europe by 2028 strategic operational change that will require new local arrangements (potential short?term costs, long?term control). PepsiCo Bottling Shift In Northern Europe And What It Means For Valuation

Negative Sentiment: PepsiCo apologised to South African consumers and pulled its ProNutro formula from shelves after a backlash immediate reputational damage, potential regulatory scrutiny and lost sales in the market; this appears to be the most direct near?term negative catalyst. PepsiCo apologises to South Africans and pulls ProNutro from shelves over formula backlash

Negative Sentiment: PepsiCo is named in a consumer lawsuit alleging ultraprocessed foods can be addictive legal risk and reputational headlines that could pressure longer?term consumer perception and marketing costs. Food giants hit with consumer lawsuit calling ultraprocessed ingredients addictive

Negative Sentiment: Erste Group trimmed FY2026/27 EPS estimates slightly a small downward analyst revision that marginally reduces near?term analyst sentiment. Erste Group Bank analyst note (MarketBeat summary)

PepsiCo Stock Performance

NASDAQ PEP opened at $157.39 on Friday. The company has a debt-to-equity ratio of 1.98, a current ratio of 0.90 and a quick ratio of 0.72. PepsiCo, Inc. has a 1 year low of $127.60 and a 1 year high of $171.48. The company has a market capitalization of $215.11 billion, a PE ratio of 24.71, a P/E/G ratio of 2.88 and a beta of 0.38. The company has a fifty day moving average of $157.96 and a two-hundred day moving average of $152.43.

PepsiCo ( NASDAQ:PEP - Get Free Report) last released its quarterly earnings data on Thursday, April 16th. The company reported $1.61 earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter, beating the consensus estimate of $1.55 by $0.06. PepsiCo had a net margin of 9.15% and a return on equity of 56.61%. The company had revenue of $19.44 billion during the quarter, compared to the consensus estimate of $18.89 billion. During the same quarter in the prior year, the firm posted $1.48 earnings per share. PepsiCo's revenue for the quarter was up 8.5% on a year-over-year basis. PepsiCo has set its FY 2026 guidance at 8.465-8.628 EPS. As a group, analysts expect that PepsiCo, Inc. will post 8.63 earnings per share for the current year.

PepsiCo announced that its Board of Directors has approved a share repurchase plan on Tuesday, February 3rd that allows the company to repurchase $10.00 billion in shares. This repurchase authorization allows the company to repurchase up to 4.7% of its shares through open market purchases. Shares repurchase plans are typically a sign that the company's board believes its shares are undervalued.

PepsiCo Dividend Announcement

The firm also recently announced a quarterly dividend, which was paid on Tuesday, March 31st. Stockholders of record on Friday, March 6th were issued a $1.4225 dividend. This represents a $5.69 dividend on an annualized basis and a dividend yield of 3.6%. The ex-dividend date of this dividend was Friday, March 6th. PepsiCo's dividend payout ratio is presently 89.32%.

Wall Street Analyst Weigh In

A number of equities analysts recently commented on the stock. Barclays boosted their target price on shares of PepsiCo from $154.00 to $158.00 and gave the stock an "equal weight" rating in a research note on Monday, April 20th. Argus upgraded shares of PepsiCo to a "hold" rating in a research note on Tuesday, February 17th. Wells Fargo & Company boosted their target price on shares of PepsiCo from $154.00 to $165.00 and gave the stock an "equal weight" rating in a research note on Wednesday, February 4th. Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft boosted their target price on shares of PepsiCo from $169.00 to $173.00 and gave the stock a "buy" rating in a research note on Friday, April 17th. Finally, The Goldman Sachs Group upped their price objective on shares of PepsiCo from $180.00 to $183.00 and gave the company a "buy" rating in a research note on Friday, April 17th. Eight equities research analysts have rated the stock with a Buy rating, eleven have given a Hold rating and one has given a Sell rating to the company's stock. According to MarketBeat, the stock currently has a consensus rating of "Hold" and an average price target of $170.26.

Check Out Our Latest Analysis on PepsiCo

PepsiCo Profile

( Free Report)

PepsiCo, Inc (NASDAQ: PEP) is a multinational food and beverage company headquartered in Purchase, New York. The company develops, manufactures, markets and sells a broad portfolio of branded food and beverage products, including carbonated and noncarbonated soft drinks, bottled water, sports drinks, juices, ready-to-drink teas and coffees, salty snacks, cereals, and other convenient foods. Its leading consumer brands include Pepsi, Mountain Dew, Gatorade, Tropicana, Quaker, Lay's, Doritos and Cheetos, among others.

Formed through the 1965 merger of Pepsi-Cola and Frito-Lay, PepsiCo has grown into a global business with integrated manufacturing, distribution and marketing operations.

urn:contentItem:6JK4-CP13-RS50-G24J-00000-00Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) Achieves 95% Localization at Shanghai Gigafactory, Strengthening China Production Network2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:42:21ZLexisNexisTesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) Achieves 95% Localization at Shanghai Gigafactory, Strengthening China Production Network

AMERICAN DAILY STOCK REPORT

UNITED STATES EDITION

13 May 2026 14:15 EDT

Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) has underscored its strong focus on the Chinese market, noting the efficiency of its local supply chain and its plan to introduce more intelligent products in China. On May 13, 2026, Grace Tao, vice-president of Tesla, said China offers an open business environment, a complete supply chain, and a talent pool that supports long-term growth in the EV sector. The company points to collaboration with more than 400 Chinese suppliers, with over 60 integrated into its global supply chain, and reports the Shanghai Gigafactory localization rate above 95 percent.

Tao added that Tesla's continued presence and investment in China reflect the market's importance. As of March 2026, Tesla had 588 direct-operated stores across 119 cities in the Chinese mainland, and the company operates more than 2,500 Supercharger stations and over 12,000 Supercharger connectors regionally. She emphasized that Tesla remains a technology company focused on AI, robotics, and energy, and indicated that additional intelligent products and technologies will be introduced in China to contribute to an advanced ecosystem. The Shanghai Gigafactory's high localization rate highlights its central role in Tesla's global production and export network and may serve as a model for other foreign firms seeking a foothold in China

SECTION 1 TESLA ACTIVITIES

SECTION 1 Tesla Activities

Activities

Tesla, Inc., a leading American electric vehicle and clean energy company headquartered in Austin, Texas, and listed on the Nasdaq, focuses on designing, manufacturing, and selling innovative electric cars, energy storage systems, and solar products. Its core business revolves around accelerating the global transition to sustainable energy, with flagship electric vehicles like the Model 3 and Model Y dominating the market through advanced battery technology and performance features. The fastest-growing segments include energy storage solutions, such as the Powerwall and Megapack, which are increasingly adopted for residential, commercial, and utility-scale applications to support renewable energy integration and grid stability. Additionally, Tesla's autonomous driving technology and artificial intelligence capabilities, embedded in vehicles and expanded through its Full Self-Driving software, are experiencing rapid expansion, driven by rising demand for smart mobility solutions. This diversification, coupled with global manufacturing expansions in China and Germany, positions Tesla as a key player in the evolving sustainable technology landscape. It is the NASDAQ's largest Auto company by market capitalisation.

urn:contentItem:6JK4-CP13-RS50-G252-00000-00Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) Partners With Houston City College To Strengthen Workforce Training2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:42:21ZLexisNexisTesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) Partners With Houston City College To Strengthen Workforce Training

AMERICAN DAILY STOCK REPORT

UNITED STATES EDITION

13 May 2026 14:16 EDT

Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Houston City College signed a memorandum of understanding on May 12, 2026 to jointly develop curriculum, share resources, and create direct training pathways for participants, reinforcing their commitment to workforce education in advanced manufacturing. The collaboration has already produced its first cohort at HCC's Stafford campus. Under the MOU, the two institutions will align classroom instruction with industry needs and expand training opportunities across the region.

The initial 12 graduates completed HCC's Industrial Maintenance and Advanced Manufacturing program, gaining hands-on skills in maintenance, troubleshooting, and adherence to safety standards. All graduates are expected to start their careers at Tesla's MegafactoryTexas in Brookshire, where the company manufactures Megapack 3 energy storage units. At the signing ceremony, HCC Chancellor Margaret Ford Fisher emphasized the importance of industry connections to create opportunities for students and the community, stating, "By partnering with Tesla, we are taking a leading role in meeting the demands of today's advanced manufacturing industry for our region." Tesla Megafactory Operations Director Javier Corral Astorga added, "We are proud to partner with Houston City College to help prepare the next generation of manufacturing professionals." The MOU also sets a goal to enroll up to 250 students by year-end, a point echoed by HCC Board of Trustees Chair Eva Loredo, who described the collaboration as a forward-looking approach to workforce education.

urn:contentItem:6JK7-7K23-S048-H24C-00000-00FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP - INDUSTRY & PEER INSIGHTS: TRENDS AND HIGHLIGHTS2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:42:22ZLexisNexisSTOCKFOX ROTHSCHILD LLP - INDUSTRY & PEER INSIGHTS: TRENDS AND HIGHLIGHTS

DASHBOARD: FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP

PermID4297411712Websitehttp://www.foxrothschild.com/IndustrySpecialized Maritime-shipping law Firm

ACTIVITIES:

Fox, Rothschild, O'Brien & Frankel, LLP provides legal services to businesses and individual clients throughout the greater Delaware Valley and central and southern New Jersey, as well as across the United States. The firms area of practice includes business, corporate and securities, labor and employment, real estate, creditors' rights, litigation, and tax and estates law. The firm was founded in 1907 and is based Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. It has offices in Doylestown, Exton, and Lansdale, Pennsylvania; Atlantic City, and Princeton, New Jersey; and Wilmington, Delaware.

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP [6 Press Releases]

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP CATHERINE MITCHELL AND THOMAS TERRELL SELECTED TO NORTH CAROLINA LAWYERS WEEKLY'S REAL ESTATE POWER LIST

Fox Rothschild congratulates Catherine B. Mitchell and Thomas E. Terrell Jr. who were named to North Carolina Lawyers Weekly's 2025 Real Estate Power List, which highlights North Carolina's leading real estate attorneys.

Mitchell, selected to the list for the second consecutive year, has handled more than $2 billion in transactions throughout her 14-year career. Mitchell is noted by North Carolina Lawyers Weekly as a "skilled advocate for national and regional clients in commercial real estate transactions throughout the development process." She advises clients on property tax exemptions for low-income housing and handles all aspects of commercial real estate transactions, including acquisitions, dispositions, leasing and financing. Her clients range from landlords and tenants to health care providers, developers and life insurance companies.

Mitchell is a Fellow of the American College of Mortgage Attorneys and a member of the University of North Carolina Asheville Board of Trustees. She also provides pro bono representation to businesses in Asheville that were affected by flooding from Hurricane Helene.

With four decades of practice, Terrell has handled zoning and land use matters in 88 of North Carolina's 100 counties, and in over 450 local governments across six states. He is hired in "hard-to-permit" industries, including mining, landfills and renewable energy.

Source: Company Website

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP HEIDY VAQUERANO NAMED TO LA BUSINESS JOURNAL'S LEADERS OF INFLUENCE LIST

Fox Rothschild congratulates Heidy Vaquerano for being named to Los Angeles Business Journal's Leaders of Influence: Thriving in Their 40s list.

Vaquerano is among 40 individuals recognized for their skills and ability to "help set growth in motion for businesses in virtually any industry."

A partner in the firm's Entertainment & Sports Law Department, Vaquerano represents musicians, producers, actors, writers, production companies, record labels, tech startups, private-equity funds and other entertainment industry players.

She possesses a deep understanding of the evolving laws and technology impacting the music industry. Vaquerano works with artists and rights companies at the forefront of a major shift in the industry to help capitalize on market opportunities.

Notably, she has represented intellectual property-focused investment firm HarbourView Equity Partners since its founding in 2021. "In the past calendar year, she was instrumental in the client securing a combined $3 billion in debt financing through securitization for catalogues," the Los Angeles Business Journal reported. The debt financings were supported by more than 75 music catalogs from a variety of artists whose acquisitions were negotiated by Vaquerano and the Fox team.

Source: Company Website

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP CAROLYN RICHMOND HONORED BY NEW YORK BUSINESS JOURNAL

Fox Rothschild congratulates Carolyn Richmond, who was recognized by the New York Business Journal as one of ten honorees who "exemplify influence in both their professional and their personal endeavors."

Associate Avery Welker spoke with his alma mater, the University of Missouri School of Law, about how engineers are increasingly transitioning into legal careers and the skills they bring to the profession.

The article explores how technical training shapes legal thinking, particularly in areas such as intellectual property and client communication. Avery emphasized that engineers entering law must adapt from focusing on correct answers to clearly explaining their reasoning, a shift that can strengthen client relationships and legal analysis.

"Law school is about showing how you get from A to B. Engineering is about finding the right B," Avery said, adding that [c]lients feel more comfortable when you can speak the language of their technology."

PermID4297411712Websitehttp://www.foxrothschild.com/IndustrySpecialized Maritime-shipping law Firm

ACTIVITIES:

Fox, Rothschild, O'Brien & Frankel, LLP provides legal services to businesses and individual clients throughout the greater Delaware Valley and central and southern New Jersey, as well as across the United States. The firms area of practice includes business, corporate and securities, labor and employment, real estate, creditors' rights, litigation, and tax and estates law. The firm was founded in 1907 and is based Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. It has offices in Doylestown, Exton, and Lansdale, Pennsylvania; Atlantic City, and Princeton, New Jersey; and Wilmington, Delaware.

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP [6 Press Releases]

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP CATHERINE MITCHELL AND THOMAS TERRELL SELECTED TO NORTH CAROLINA LAWYERS WEEKLY'S REAL ESTATE POWER LIST

Fox Rothschild congratulates Catherine B. Mitchell and Thomas E. Terrell Jr. who were named to North Carolina Lawyers Weekly's 2025 Real Estate Power List, which highlights North Carolina's leading real estate attorneys.

Mitchell, selected to the list for the second consecutive year, has handled more than $2 billion in transactions throughout her 14-year career. Mitchell is noted by North Carolina Lawyers Weekly as a "skilled advocate for national and regional clients in commercial real estate transactions throughout the development process." She advises clients on property tax exemptions for low-income housing and handles all aspects of commercial real estate transactions, including acquisitions, dispositions, leasing and financing. Her clients range from landlords and tenants to health care providers, developers and life insurance companies.

Mitchell is a Fellow of the American College of Mortgage Attorneys and a member of the University of North Carolina Asheville Board of Trustees. She also provides pro bono representation to businesses in Asheville that were affected by flooding from Hurricane Helene.

With four decades of practice, Terrell has handled zoning and land use matters in 88 of North Carolina's 100 counties, and in over 450 local governments across six states. He is hired in "hard-to-permit" industries, including mining, landfills and renewable energy.

Source: Company Website

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP HEIDY VAQUERANO NAMED TO LA BUSINESS JOURNAL'S LEADERS OF INFLUENCE LIST

Fox Rothschild congratulates Heidy Vaquerano for being named to Los Angeles Business Journal's Leaders of Influence: Thriving in Their 40s list.

Vaquerano is among 40 individuals recognized for their skills and ability to "help set growth in motion for businesses in virtually any industry."

A partner in the firm's Entertainment & Sports Law Department, Vaquerano represents musicians, producers, actors, writers, production companies, record labels, tech startups, private-equity funds and other entertainment industry players.

She possesses a deep understanding of the evolving laws and technology impacting the music industry. Vaquerano works with artists and rights companies at the forefront of a major shift in the industry to help capitalize on market opportunities.

Notably, she has represented intellectual property-focused investment firm HarbourView Equity Partners since its founding in 2021. "In the past calendar year, she was instrumental in the client securing a combined $3 billion in debt financing through securitization for catalogues," the Los Angeles Business Journal reported. The debt financings were supported by more than 75 music catalogs from a variety of artists whose acquisitions were negotiated by Vaquerano and the Fox team.

Source: Company Website

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP CAROLYN RICHMOND HONORED BY NEW YORK BUSINESS JOURNAL

Fox Rothschild congratulates Carolyn Richmond, who was recognized by the New York Business Journal as one of ten honorees who "exemplify influence in both their professional and their personal endeavors."

Part of the publication's Women of Influence program, Richmond's selection reflects her significant and lasting impact on the hospitality sector and her commitment to advancing workplace compliance and innovation.

Chair of the firm's Hospitality Practice, Richmond is a trusted employment attorney to New York's restaurant industry. She helps clients address evolving challenges, including wage and hour laws, workplace regulations, union organizing and crisis management.

Source: Company Website

+ GAMING PARTNER KIERON FRAZIER JOINS FOX ROTHSCHILD IN CHICAGO

Fox Rothschild welcomes Kieron A. Frazier to the Chicago office as a Partner in the Gaming Group.

"With Illinois' gaming industry continuing to boom, we are thrilled to welcome Kieron to our Chicago office," said Gordon E. Gouveia, Fox's Chicago Office Managing Partner. "Kieron's depth of experience in the gaming sector, combined with his unique background in sports law make him a valuable addition to our respected gaming industry team."

A corporate and transactional attorney, Frazier focuses his practice on the gaming industry.

He provides advice on regulatory compliance, licensure and internal investigations in addition to transactions and other general corporate matters. Frazier's clients include leaders in sports wagering, fantasy sports, iGaming, horse tracks, video gaming and lotteries. He also supports tribal licensees and social gaming operators and investors.

In addition, Frazier counsels clients on a variety of corporate and finance matters, including team-level transactional work, financing, media transactions, mergers and acquisitions.

Source: Company Website

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP RICK COUGHLIN, JEFF MACHARG AND BRAD RISINGER SELECTED AS MANAGING PARTNERS TO WATCH

Fox Rothschild congratulates Greensboro, Charlotte and Raleigh Office Managing Partners, Richard A. Coughlin, Jeffrey P. MacHarg and Bradley M. Risinger, who were all recognized by North Carolina Lawyers Weekly as Managing Partners to Watch.

The annual feature spotlights managing partners who are "equal parts administrative genius and skilled legal practitioner."

Coughlin, selected for the second consecutive year, became Greensboro Managing Partner in 2021. Under his leadership the office has grown to become firm's largest in the Carolinas. Coughlin also serves as the firm's Deputy General Counsel where he plays an important part in helping lawyers navigate difficult situations. He told North Carolina Lawyers Weekly that, "if you put in enough effort and promote good communication, you usually can find a solution that benefits everyone." With an eye toward giving back to the community, Coughlin worked with the office to pledge $100,000 to support a Cone Health mobile health unit that will provide essential medical services to underserved communities in North Carolina.

Honoring his commitment to leadership and adaptability, this marks MacHarg's third year on the list. Since assuming the Charlotte Managing Partner role in 2021, he has doubled the number of attorneys in the office. MacHarg also led the team's relocation effort, moving the office into the heart of Charlotte's central business district. He maintains an active litigation practice with clients spanning a variety of industries. Colleagues continue to be inspired by the passion he brings to both roles, noting to North Carolina Lawyers Weekly that MacHarg remains "fully engaged and has made a significant impact on office life."

Risinger took the reins as Raleigh Managing Partner in 2022. He brings 35 years of legal experience to the role. A seasoned trial lawyer whose practice centers on commercial disputes, he is highlighted for representing law firms and media outlets denied access to public records by law enforcement - all cases that raise concerns about First Amendment rights and government transparency. A zealous advocate, Risinger says that "especially in today's climate, this is a fight that's always worth waging." North Carolina Lawyers Weekly also cited his involvement in local community organizations, including United Way of North Carolina and NC 211, the state's health and human services referral network.

Source: Company Website

+ FOX ROTHSCHILD DONATES $1 MILLION TO SUPPORT YOUTH PROGRAMS THROUGH GENERATION FOX INITIATIVE

Fox Rothschild's Generation Fox community service initiative has donated $1 million, more than 5,000 items and 800+ service hours to more than 225 organizations that empower youth from coast to coast.

"Giving back has always been deeply personal to us and our firm culture - it's part of who we are," said Firmwide Managing Partner Todd A. Rodriguez. "With Generation Fox, we've put youth at the heart of our charitable efforts and community engagement. Our goal is to make a difference, and the results speak for themselves."

Launched in July 2024, Generation Fox invests in and supports youth in the communities where the firm has offices across the U.S. The initiative encompasses a multitude of ways that Fox gives back to its communities, with a focus on children up to age 18.

During the holidays, Generation Fox is stepping up its commitment to supporting local schools by providing essential supplies and financial assistance. Our offices have organized events or donation drives addressing the most urgent needs of schools in their communities.

"While every one of our offices has its own unique character, we are united by a shared purpose: to empower youth in our communities," said Holly Lentz Kleeman, Chief Business Development and Marketing Officer at Fox. "By collaborating with our local schools we are making a shared investment in the future."

Generation Fox was designed to be flexible so that lawyers, practice groups, offices and the firm's business professionals can each work and donate in ways that make sense in their cities and neighborhoods. The goals are equally expansive: to support groups that empower kids in their education and in their play, in cultural development, in nutrition, in health and well-being, and through protection of their legal rights.

Source: Company Website

+ K&L GATES [3 Press Releases]

+ TWO K&L GATES PARTNERS AGAIN NAMED TO INDIA BUSINESS LAW JOURNALS INTERNATIONAL A-LIST 2026

K&L Gates is pleased to announce that Singapore Office Managing Partner Raja Bose and Singapore Corporate partner Meraj Noor have once again been named to India Business Law Journal's (IBLJ) International A-List. This marks the eighth consecutive year both partners have received this recognition.

IBLJ's International A-List identifies the top lawyers based outside of India who are recognized for their work on India-related matters. The A-List was compiled by IBLJ's seasoned editorial team following extensive market research, drawing on feedback from hundreds of lawyers at Indian law firms and thousands of India-focused in-house counsel within India and abroad.

The full International A-List 2026 is featured on IBLJ's website.

**All Singapore lawyers are members of K&L Gates Straits Law LLC, the Singapore office of global law firm K&L Gates. Source: Company Website

+ MORE THAN 80 K&L GATES LAWYERS ACROSS ASIA-PACIFIC RECOGNISED IN 2027 BEST LAWYERS, ONES TO WATCH EDITIONS

Best Lawyers®, a peer-review publication in the legal profession, has named more than 80 K&L Gates lawyers across the Asia-Pacific region in the 2027 editions of its guides, covering Australia, Japan, and Singapore. In addition, nearly 20 of the firm's lawyers were named as Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch® in Australia and Japan, lists that recognise lawyers early in their careers.

Alongside these recognitions, four Australian partners were recognised with "Lawyer of the Year" awards, an accolade that is particularly noteworthy, as it is only bestowed on one standout lawyer for each practice area in each jurisdiction.

The Best Lawyers® guides highlight top legal talent, selected by peers within the same geographical region and legal practice area, through millions of votes each year. Congratulations to the Lawyer of the Year award recipients below, as well as all lawyers recognised in the 2027 editions - resulting in nearly 180 total recognitions for the firm. Source: Company Website

+ K&L GATES ADVISES DOLPHIN ENTERTAINMENT, INC. ON US$15 MILLION PIPE INVESTMENT

Global law firm K&L Gates LLP advised Dolphin Entertainment, Inc., an entertainment marketing and premium content production company, in connection with a US$15 million private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing with Lincoln Park Capital, an investment group and asset management firm.

The Corporate team advising on the transaction was led by Miami partner Clayton Parker with support from Miami partner Erin Fogarty.

"This transaction underscores Dolphin Entertainment's commitment to accelerating strategic growth across its marketing and content-driven businesses. We were pleased to support them in securing investment from a partner aligned with its long-term vision," said Parker.

K&L Gates' Corporate practice is one of the most substantial in the legal industry, with hundreds of lawyers in offices across the globe providing clients with practical legal solutions in the structuring, financing, and completion of domestic, international, and cross-border transactions. Source: Company Website

+ REED SMITH LLP [4 Press Releases]

+ REED SMITH ADVISES NATURPAK ON SALE BY TRIVEST TO PPC

CHICAGO - Global law firm Reed Smith represented Trivest Partners and IPMF, LLC, doing business as NaturPak, a manufacturer of bone broths, soups, sauces, wet pet food, and food ingredients for national retailers and brands, on its sale by Trivest Growth Investment Fund II to Pritzker Private Capital ("PPC"). Trivest Growth Investment Fund II, managed by Trivest Partners LP, a private equity firm focused exclusively on investments in founder- and family owned businesses, partnered with NaturPak through a minority investment in 2020. During Trivest's partnership, NaturPak transformed from a small specialty co-manufacturer into a scaled, multi-segment platform, increasing its R&D and manufacturing capabilities and production capacity.

The cross-office Reed Smith deal team included attorneys in Chicago, New York, Denver, Philadelphia, Dallas, Orange County (California), Pittsburgh, Washington, Houston, Tysons (Virginia), and Miami. The team was led by Nick Gibson, Kristen Capriotti, Crockett Stevenson, and Sudeep Kalkunte, with support from Constantine Karides, Brad Schmarak, David Hayes, Simon Kliegman, Ian Sherwin, Paulo McKeeby, Daniel Hagedorn, Michelle Mantine, Cori Goldberg, A.J. Wissinger, Jillian Burstein, Tyler Thompson, Mike Summers, Michael Jacobs, Brendan Leanos, Benjamin Brimeyer, Michael Galibois, Michael Lowell, Joseph Mammone Jr., Michelle DiPuma, Batool Banker, Leah Hungerman, Taber Rueter, Clirae Bourke, Michaela Mapes, Peter Loy, Talia Boiangin Behar, Elliott Race, George Avdellas, Katherine Litaker, Taylor Kollmansberger, and Nikita Bazaj.

Source: Company Website

+ REED SMITH PARTNERS JOSH LOVE, ERIC MARDER, STEPHEN SESSA, AND EDWARD SHAPIRO NAMED TO VARIETY'S "DEALMAKERS 2025" REPORT

LOS ANGELES - Global law firm Reed Smith announced today that Josh Love, Eric Marder, Stephen Sessa, and Edward Shapiro, partners in the firm's global Entertainment & Media Industry Group, have been named to Variety's "Dealmakers 2025" report. Love, Marder, Sessa, and Shapiro are among an elite group of entertainment attorneys who have been chosen based on their more than $3 billion in music transactions in 2025, high‑profile client roster, and leadership across the music industry. The publication highlights their work on "sports and music transactions, start-ups and brands," "recording, music publishing, and live performance agreements (including Bad Bunny's upcoming Super Bowl halftime show)," and "catalog acquisitions."

This recognition reflects Reed Smith's continued leadership in high-stakes entertainment and music transactions, talent representation, and emerging legal issues at the intersection of entertainment, music, technology, and finance. The four partners were selected for their high-profile talent negotiations and representation business.

Source: Company Website

+ REED SMITH ADVISES LEON CAPITAL ON STRATEGIC INVESTMENT IN AVANTIS GROUP

LONDON - Global law firm Reed Smith has advised funds advised by Leon Capital on the strategic investment in Avantis Group, a UK-based provider of specialist engineering services to the maritime and energy industries. The transaction, which represents the latest new investment by Leon Capital, completed on 23 December 2025. The terms of the investment are confidential.

The transaction involved the Development Bank of Wales and Avantis Group's founders, Chris David and Tom David. Avantis Group's existing management team will retain operational control of the business. Blake Morgan acted as legal counsel to the Development Bank of Wales, while Acuity Law advised the founders. AMA Capital Partners acted as corporate finance adviser to Avantis Group.

Reed Smith advised Leon Capital on all aspects of the transaction, providing comprehensive M&A support in connection with the strategic investment. The matter involved a multi-disciplinary team spanning M&A, tax, and regulatory considerations.

The investment supports Avantis Group's long-term growth strategy across maritime and energy markets, including expansion into digital infrastructure and defence, and reflects Leon Capital's confidence in the company's differentiated engineering platform and experienced management team.

For Reed Smith, the transaction represents a further example of the firm's work advising private capital sponsors on complex M&A transactions and continues to strengthen its relationship with Leon Capital as it expands its platform.

The Reed Smith team advising on the matter was led by Andrew Houghton, with support from Ciaran Sweeney, Georgia Moorhouse and Selina Cook on M&A matters; Caspar Fox and Tom Baxter on tax; and Emma Weeden on FDI and antitrust.

Source: Company Website

+ REED SMITH STRENGTHENS ASIA-PACIFIC FINANCE AND TRANSPORTATION CAPABILITY WITH HIRE IN SINGAPORE

SINGAPORE - Global law firm Reed Smith announced the appointment of banking and finance partner Dr. Gregory Xu to its Singapore office. Xu, who joins from Stephenson Harwood, where he led the general banking and project finance offering in Southeast Asia and served on the firm's Supervisory Council, its executive committee, will join Reed Smith's Transportation Industry Group.

With over 15 years of experience, Xu advises on high-value, cross-border transactions across a wide range of sectors, including transportation - shipping, aviation, and logistics - trade, life sciences, energy, and technology. He regularly acts for financial institutions, funds, export credit agencies, leasing houses, asset owners, and Fortune 500 companies on complex financing, restructuring, and enforcement matters.

Xu has a strong track record in green and sustainability-linked lending and advises on multi-jurisdictional insolvency-related enforcement and restructuring matters. He also brings extensive experience in general corporate and commercial matters.

Richard Hakes, chair of Reed Smith's Transportation Industry Group, said: "Gregory is an outstanding addition to our team, bringing deep knowledge of ship finance, aviation finance, and banking throughout Southeast Asia. His arrival further strengthens our capabilities in Singapore and reinforces our commitment to the maritime, aviation, and broader transportation sectors across the Asia-Pacific region and beyond. Working closely with our shipping teams in Hong Kong and Shanghai and our aviation team in Singapore as part of our global Transportation Industry Group, Gregory will enhance our ability to provide seamless, cross-border support to clients operating in one of the world's most dynamic industries."

Xu commented: "Reed Smith's global platform, sector focus, and collaborative culture are hugely impressive. The firm's market-leading finance practice and its long-standing reputation in general banking, asset finance, and project finance were major draws for me. I'm delighted to be joining such a highly collegiate team with a clear strategy for growth in the region and look forward to contributing to the continued expansion of the firm's finance offering across Asia-Pacific."

Praj Samant, Reed Smith's Asia-Pacific managing partner, said: "We are delighted to welcome Gregory to the Singapore team. His arrival further strengthens our offering in one of the region's most strategically important sectors. We look forward to the valuable contributions he will bring to the firm locally and globally."

Xu is recognized as a leading practitioner by multiple legal directories. Chambers Asia-Pacific ranks him as a "Leading Individual" for Banking & Finance (India), while The Legal 500 identifies him as a "Leading Partner," "Next Generation Partner," and "Recommended" lawyer across Banking & Finance, Asset Finance, Projects, and Shipping in Singapore and in the foreign juris

+ FORMER SEC DEPUTY DIRECTOR NEKIA HACKWORTH JOINS JONES DAY AS PARTNER IN ATLANTA

Nekia Hackworth has joined Jones Day as a partner in its Investigations & White Collar Defense Practice. She is based in the Firm's Atlanta Office.

Ms. Hackworth has more than 20 years of experience in both government and private practice as a lawyer representing clients in white-collar criminal cases and civil litigation, conducting government and internal investigations, and counseling companies on corporate compliance matters. She served most recently as the Deputy Director of Enforcement in the Southeast Region for the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), where she supervised more than 250 professionals with responsibility for SEC matters across three offices (Washington, Atlanta, and Miami) and 11 jurisdictions. She oversaw hundreds of investigations in her tenure at the SEC, including suspected market manipulation, insider trading, and investment adviser fraud.

Nekia Hackworth has joined Jones Day as a partner in its Investigations & White Collar Defense Practice. She is based in the Firm's Atlanta Office.

+ DERIVATIVES LAWYER COLIN RICE JOINS JONES DAY IN SINGAPORE

Colin Rice has joined Jones Day as a partner in its Financial Markets Practice. He is based in the Firm's Singapore Office.

Mr. Rice is an experienced derivatives lawyer who has counseled clients on a broad range of financial markets transactions, with a particular focus on OTC derivatives, structured products, structured finance transactions, repos, and securities lending. He works with global investment banks, retail banks, funds, corporates, and service providers. He also advises on uncleared derivatives margin reform and collateral arrangements, default management, and the impact of global regulatory developments on derivatives businesses and documentation.

"Colin is an important addition to our global derivatives team. Asia is a fast-growing market with more and more netting friendly jurisdictions, and he is among the most experienced lawyers in the region on these matters," said Alban Caillemer du Ferrage, chair of Jones Day's Financial Markets department for EMEA and APAC. "Colin served as a director in the Singapore office of one of the world's largest investment banks. We will be able to work with our largest clients on their most complex derivatives transactions there. I am delighted to welcome him to our global group."

Source: Company Website
